---
title: "Matrix Transformation Playground"
page-layout: full
toc: false
number-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .quarto-title-block {
    display: none;
  }

  .matrix-playground {
    min-height: calc(100vh - 76px);
    padding: clamp(14px, 2vw, 28px);
    background: #f5f7fb;
  }

  .matrix-playground-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 18px;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }

  .matrix-playground-title {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 3.4rem);
    line-height: 1.05;
    font-weight: 760;
    color: #111827;
  }

  .matrix-playground-subtitle {
    margin: 8px 0 0;
    max-width: 900px;
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.25vw, 1.3rem);
    color: #4b5565;
  }

  .matrix-playground-shell {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(360px, 460px) minmax(0, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
    min-height: min(820px, calc(100vh - 190px));
  }

  .matrix-panel,
  .matrix-stage {
    border: 1px solid #d6dde8;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: #ffffff;
    box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
  }

  .matrix-panel {
    padding: 22px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .matrix-controls-title {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 750;
    color: #111827;
  }

  .matrix-input-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 14px;
  }

  .matrix-input-grid label {
    display: grid;
    gap: 6px;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    color: #4b5565;
    font-weight: 650;
  }

  .matrix-input-grid input {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 64px;
    border: 1px solid #b9c3d2;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    font: inherit;
    font-size: 1.75rem;
    font-weight: 680;
    background: #ffffff;
    color: #111827;
  }

  .matrix-display {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr 1fr auto;
    gap: 10px 16px;
    align-items: center;
    justify-items: center;
    padding: 16px;
    border: 1px solid #e3e7ef;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #f8fafc;
    color: #111827;
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 720;
  }

  .matrix-bracket {
    grid-row: span 2;
    font-size: 4.7rem;
    line-height: 0.82;
    color: #64748b;
  }

  .matrix-presets {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .matrix-presets button,
  .matrix-action {
    border: 1px solid #b9c3d2;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #ffffff;
    color: #1f2937;
    padding: 13px 14px;
    font: inherit;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    font-weight: 680;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .matrix-presets button:hover,
  .matrix-action:hover {
    background: #edf2f7;
  }

  .matrix-actions {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .matrix-action-primary {
    background: #111827;
    border-color: #111827;
    color: #ffffff;
  }

  .matrix-action-primary:hover {
    background: #273244;
  }

  .matrix-stats {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .matrix-stat {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 18px;
    border: 1px solid #e3e7ef;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    font-size: 1.08rem;
    color: #4b5565;
  }

  .matrix-stat strong {
    color: #111827;
    font-size: 1.35rem;
    font-weight: 760;
  }

  .matrix-stage {
    min-width: 0;
    padding: 16px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .matrix-legend {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 14px 18px;
    align-items: center;
    color: #4b5565;
    font-size: 1rem;
  }

  .matrix-legend span {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 7px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .legend-line {
    width: 32px;
    height: 5px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .matrix-canvas {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 560px;
    background: #ffffff;
  }

  .matrix-playground:fullscreen {
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: 24px;
  }

  .matrix-playground:fullscreen .matrix-playground-shell {
    min-height: calc(100vh - 140px);
  }

  .matrix-playground:fullscreen .matrix-canvas {
    min-height: calc(100vh - 230px);
  }

  @media (max-width: 980px) {
    .matrix-playground-shell {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .matrix-canvas {
      min-height: 520px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 620px) {
    .matrix-playground {
      padding: 10px;
    }

    .matrix-playground-header {
      display: grid;
    }

    .matrix-input-grid,
    .matrix-presets,
    .matrix-actions {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .matrix-canvas {
      min-height: 430px;
    }
  }
</style>

<div class="matrix-playground" id="matrix-playground">
  <header class="matrix-playground-header">
    <div>
      <h1 class="matrix-playground-title">Matrix Transformation Playground</h1>
      <p class="matrix-playground-subtitle">Change the entries of a 2x2 matrix and watch the grid, basis vectors, unit square, and arrow-shaped region transform.</p>
    </div>
    <a class="matrix-action" href="linear-transformations.html">Back to chapter</a>
  </header>

  <div class="matrix-playground-shell">
    <section class="matrix-panel" aria-label="Matrix controls">
      <div class="matrix-controls-title">Matrix entries</div>
      <div class="matrix-input-grid">
        <label>a<input id="matrix-a" type="number" step="0.1" value="1" inputmode="decimal"></label>
        <label>b<input id="matrix-b" type="number" step="0.1" value="0.6" inputmode="decimal"></label>
        <label>c<input id="matrix-c" type="number" step="0.1" value="-0.3" inputmode="decimal"></label>
        <label>d<input id="matrix-d" type="number" step="0.1" value="1" inputmode="decimal"></label>
      </div>

      <div class="matrix-display" aria-label="Current matrix">
        <span class="matrix-bracket">[</span>
        <span id="display-a">1</span>
        <span id="display-b">0.6</span>
        <span class="matrix-bracket">]</span>
        <span id="display-c">-0.3</span>
        <span id="display-d">1</span>
      </div>

      <div class="matrix-presets" aria-label="Preset matrices">
        <button type="button" data-matrix="1,0,0,1">Identity</button>
        <button type="button" data-matrix="1,0.8,0,1">Shear</button>
        <button type="button" data-matrix="0,-1,1,0">Rotate 90</button>
        <button type="button" data-matrix="1,0,0,-1">Reflect</button>
        <button type="button" data-matrix="1,0,0,0">Project</button>
        <button type="button" data-matrix="1.2,0.7,-0.4,0.9">Mixed</button>
      </div>

      <div class="matrix-actions">
        <button type="button" class="matrix-action" id="matrix-reset">Reset</button>
        <button type="button" class="matrix-action matrix-action-primary" id="matrix-fullscreen">Fullscreen</button>
      </div>

      <div class="matrix-stats" aria-live="polite">
        <div class="matrix-stat"><span>determinant</span><strong id="matrix-det">1.00</strong></div>
        <div class="matrix-stat"><span>area scale</span><strong id="matrix-area">1.00</strong></div>
        <div class="matrix-stat"><span>orientation</span><strong id="matrix-orientation">preserved</strong></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="matrix-stage" aria-label="Transformed grid visualization">
      <div class="matrix-legend">
        <span><i class="legend-line" style="background:#cfd6e3"></i>original grid</span>
        <span><i class="legend-line" style="background:#2f6fdd"></i>image of vertical lines</span>
        <span><i class="legend-line" style="background:#e07a2f"></i>image of horizontal lines</span>
        <span><i class="legend-line" style="background:#159a8a"></i>basis vectors</span>
        <span><i class="legend-line" style="background:#7c3aed"></i>transformed arrow shape</span>
      </div>
      <svg class="matrix-canvas" id="matrix-svg" viewBox="0 0 1000 760" role="img" aria-label="Original grid and transformed grid under a two by two matrix"></svg>
    </section>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(() => {
  const playground = document.getElementById("matrix-playground");
  const svg = document.getElementById("matrix-svg");
  const inputs = {
    a: document.getElementById("matrix-a"),
    b: document.getElementById("matrix-b"),
    c: document.getElementById("matrix-c"),
    d: document.getElementById("matrix-d"),
  };
  const displays = {
    a: document.getElementById("display-a"),
    b: document.getElementById("display-b"),
    c: document.getElementById("display-c"),
    d: document.getElementById("display-d"),
  };
  const detEl = document.getElementById("matrix-det");
  const areaEl = document.getElementById("matrix-area");
  const orientationEl = document.getElementById("matrix-orientation");
  const resetButton = document.getElementById("matrix-reset");
  const fullscreenButton = document.getElementById("matrix-fullscreen");
  const presets = document.querySelectorAll("#matrix-playground [data-matrix]");

  const width = 1000;
  const height = 760;
  const margin = 70;
  const gridExtent = 4;
  const defaultMatrix = [1, 0.6, -0.3, 1];
  const arrowShape = [
    [-2.2, -0.55],
    [0.15, -0.55],
    [0.15, -1.05],
    [1.35, 0],
    [0.15, 1.05],
    [0.15, 0.55],
    [-2.2, 0.55],
  ];
  svg.setAttribute("viewBox", `0 0 ${width} ${height}`);

  function numberFrom(input, fallback) {
    const value = Number(input.value);
    return Number.isFinite(value) ? value : fallback;
  }

  function formatNumber(value) {
    return Number(value.toFixed(3)).toString();
  }

  function currentMatrix() {
    return [
      numberFrom(inputs.a, 0),
      numberFrom(inputs.b, 0),
      numberFrom(inputs.c, 0),
      numberFrom(inputs.d, 0),
    ];
  }

  function applyMatrix(matrix, point) {
    const [a, b, c, d] = matrix;
    const [x, y] = point;
    return [a * x + b * y, c * x + d * y];
  }

  function linePoints(matrix) {
    const points = [];
    for (let i = -gridExtent; i <= gridExtent; i += 1) {
      points.push(applyMatrix(matrix, [i, -gridExtent]));
      points.push(applyMatrix(matrix, [i, gridExtent]));
      points.push(applyMatrix(matrix, [-gridExtent, i]));
      points.push(applyMatrix(matrix, [gridExtent, i]));
    }
    points.push([-gridExtent, -gridExtent], [gridExtent, gridExtent]);
    points.push(applyMatrix(matrix, [1, 0]), applyMatrix(matrix, [0, 1]));
    points.push(...arrowShape);
    points.push(...arrowShape.map((point) => applyMatrix(matrix, point)));
    return points;
  }

  function viewport(matrix) {
    const points = linePoints(matrix);
    const maxAbs = Math.max(
      1,
      ...points.map(([x, y]) => Math.max(Math.abs(x), Math.abs(y)))
    );
    const world = Math.ceil(maxAbs * 1.15);
    const scale = Math.min((width - 2 * margin) / (2 * world), (height - 2 * margin) / (2 * world));

    return {
      project([x, y]) {
        return [
          width / 2 + x * scale,
          height / 2 - y * scale,
        ];
      },
    };
  }

  function svgEl(name, attrs = {}) {
    const node = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", name);
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(attrs)) {
      node.setAttribute(key, value);
    }
    return node;
  }

  function addLine(group, view, p1, p2, attrs) {
    const [x1, y1] = view.project(p1);
    const [x2, y2] = view.project(p2);
    group.appendChild(svgEl("line", { x1, y1, x2, y2, ...attrs }));
  }

  function addPolyline(group, view, points, attrs) {
    const projected = points.map((point) => view.project(point).map((x) => x.toFixed(2)).join(",")).join(" ");
    group.appendChild(svgEl("polyline", { points: projected, ...attrs }));
  }

  function addPolygon(group, view, points, attrs) {
    const projected = points.map((point) => view.project(point).map((x) => x.toFixed(2)).join(",")).join(" ");
    group.appendChild(svgEl("polygon", { points: projected, ...attrs }));
  }

  function addArrowVector(group, view, start, end, color, label) {
    addLine(group, view, start, end, {
      stroke: color,
      "stroke-width": 5.2,
      "stroke-linecap": "round",
      "marker-end": `url(#arrow-${color.slice(1)})`,
    });

    const [x, y] = view.project(end);
    const text = svgEl("text", {
      x: x + 12,
      y: y - 12,
      fill: color,
      "font-size": 24,
      "font-weight": 760,
    });
    text.textContent = label;
    group.appendChild(text);
  }

  function marker(color) {
    return `
      <marker id="arrow-${color.slice(1)}" markerWidth="11" markerHeight="11" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto" markerUnits="strokeWidth">
        <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="${color}" />
      </marker>
    `;
  }

  function render() {
    const matrix = currentMatrix();
    const [a, b, c, d] = matrix;
    const det = a * d - b * c;
    const view = viewport(matrix);

    svg.innerHTML = `
      <defs>
        ${marker("#159a8a")}
        ${marker("#b45309")}
      </defs>
      <rect width="${width}" height="${height}" fill="#ffffff"></rect>
    `;

    const original = svgEl("g");
    const transformed = svgEl("g");
    const foreground = svgEl("g");
    svg.append(original, transformed, foreground);

    for (let i = -gridExtent; i <= gridExtent; i += 1) {
      const strong = i === 0;
      addLine(original, view, [i, -gridExtent], [i, gridExtent], {
        stroke: strong ? "#9aa4b2" : "#cfd6e3",
        "stroke-width": strong ? 2.2 : 1.2,
      });
      addLine(original, view, [-gridExtent, i], [gridExtent, i], {
        stroke: strong ? "#9aa4b2" : "#cfd6e3",
        "stroke-width": strong ? 2.2 : 1.2,
      });
    }

    for (let i = -gridExtent; i <= gridExtent; i += 1) {
      const verticalStart = applyMatrix(matrix, [i, -gridExtent]);
      const verticalEnd = applyMatrix(matrix, [i, gridExtent]);
      const horizontalStart = applyMatrix(matrix, [-gridExtent, i]);
      const horizontalEnd = applyMatrix(matrix, [gridExtent, i]);
      addLine(transformed, view, verticalStart, verticalEnd, {
        stroke: i === 0 ? "#184fa3" : "#2f6fdd",
        "stroke-width": i === 0 ? 3.6 : 2.1,
        opacity: 0.88,
      });
      addLine(transformed, view, horizontalStart, horizontalEnd, {
        stroke: i === 0 ? "#b45309" : "#e07a2f",
        "stroke-width": i === 0 ? 3.6 : 2.1,
        opacity: 0.88,
      });
    }

    addPolygon(original, view, arrowShape, {
      fill: "rgba(107, 114, 128, 0.08)",
      stroke: "#6b7280",
      "stroke-width": 2.4,
      "stroke-dasharray": "9 8",
      "stroke-linejoin": "round",
    });

    const arrowImage = arrowShape.map((point) => applyMatrix(matrix, point));
    addPolygon(foreground, view, arrowImage, {
      fill: "rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.18)",
      stroke: "#7c3aed",
      "stroke-width": 4,
      "stroke-linejoin": "round",
    });

    const square = [
      applyMatrix(matrix, [0, 0]),
      applyMatrix(matrix, [1, 0]),
      applyMatrix(matrix, [1, 1]),
      applyMatrix(matrix, [0, 1]),
      applyMatrix(matrix, [0, 0]),
    ];
    addPolyline(foreground, view, square, {
      fill: "rgba(21, 154, 138, 0.14)",
      stroke: "#159a8a",
      "stroke-width": 3.6,
      "stroke-linejoin": "round",
    });

    addArrowVector(foreground, view, [0, 0], applyMatrix(matrix, [1, 0]), "#159a8a", "Ae1");
    addArrowVector(foreground, view, [0, 0], applyMatrix(matrix, [0, 1]), "#b45309", "Ae2");

    const origin = view.project([0, 0]);
    foreground.appendChild(svgEl("circle", {
      cx: origin[0],
      cy: origin[1],
      r: 6,
      fill: "#111827",
    }));

    detEl.textContent = det.toFixed(3);
    areaEl.textContent = Math.abs(det).toFixed(3);
    orientationEl.textContent =
      Math.abs(det) < 1e-9 ? "collapsed" : det > 0 ? "preserved" : "reversed";

    [displays.a.textContent, displays.b.textContent, displays.c.textContent, displays.d.textContent] =
      matrix.map(formatNumber);
  }

  function setMatrix(values) {
    [inputs.a.value, inputs.b.value, inputs.c.value, inputs.d.value] = values;
    render();
  }

  Object.values(inputs).forEach((input) => input.addEventListener("input", render));
  presets.forEach((button) => {
    button.addEventListener("click", () => setMatrix(button.dataset.matrix.split(",").map(Number)));
  });
  resetButton.addEventListener("click", () => setMatrix(defaultMatrix));
  fullscreenButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
    if (!document.fullscreenElement) {
      await playground.requestFullscreen();
      fullscreenButton.textContent = "Exit fullscreen";
    } else {
      await document.exitFullscreen();
      fullscreenButton.textContent = "Fullscreen";
    }
  });
  document.addEventListener("fullscreenchange", () => {
    fullscreenButton.textContent = document.fullscreenElement ? "Exit fullscreen" : "Fullscreen";
  });

  render();
})();
</script>
```
